headlines.description: — Connor Bedard scored with 54 seconds left and Arvid Soderblom made 30 saves, helping the Chicago Blackhawks beat the New York Islanders 5-3 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bedard scores in 3rd period as the Blackhawks beat the Islanders 5-3

tracking.trackingName: NHL_One-Play (Max Domi scores goal for Maple Leafs) 2024/12/15 ESHEET

headlines.description: — John Tavares scored twice as part of a second-period outburst and added an empty netter for his 14th career hat trick as the Toronto Maple Leafs battled back from a 3-1 deficit to pick up a 5-3 victory over the Buffalo Sabres on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: John Tavares registers 14th career hat trick as the Maple Leafs come back to defeat the Sabres 5-3

video.headline: Nicholas Robertson fires no-look pass to set up Max Domi's goal

headlines.description: — Dustin Tokarski made 27 saves in his first NHL appearance in nearly 22 months to help the Carolina Hurricanes beat the Columbus Blue Jackets 4-1 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dustin Tokarski wins in NHL return, helping Hurricanes beat Blue Jackets 4-1

events.name: New York Rangers at St. Louis Blues

headlines.description: — Joel Hofer made 26 saves, Robert Thomas had a goal and an assist and the St. Louis Blues beat the reeling New York Rangers 3-2 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thomas, Hofer spark the Blues to a 3-2 victory over the Rangers
